author: Faycal Farhat
name: GQA Macro Meta-Preconditioned
blurb: Non-record 8xH100 10-minute SP1024 run for an adaptive GQA transformer with macro side-channel cross-attention, detached macro distillation, adaptive depth/router controls, meta-preconditioned local transforms, banked parallel Muon, and int4+zlib roundtrip export. Final exact int4+zlib roundtrip val_bpb is 1.19995391 under the 16MB artifact cap.
